script:
the work is the way.


the work is the way.


Every morning before Rome was awake, Marcus Aurelius sat with his journal and wrote what he owed the day. Not what he wanted. What he owed.


the work is the way.


You swore last night you would finish the OATH spec without doomscrolling first.

That is what you owe this morning.

Not a scroll. Not a headline. Not one more minute of someone else's noise.

The spec.

Finished.


the work is the way.


In the next five minutes, you open the laptop.

You close every other tab.

One screen. One file. One debt paid.


the work is the way.


Open the laptop.
